sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71330" key="nu/stacis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νύστ-αξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71330.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drowsiness,</tr_> Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νῶκαρ.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
